task: Refactor oh-my-grokbuild into a Grok-native plugin: one entry-point skill that orchestrates a deeply detailed team of per-file roles. Verified locally via npm tests, E2E against an existing Grok login, installed under ~/.grok/plugins/local, and published as a public GitHub repository.

stories.title: Research-grounded plugin design with Grok native layout
acceptanceCriteria: docs/research/grok-build-docs.md lists official xAI docs checked and the plugin policy gap, and records that Grok bundled extensions ship roles/<name>.toml plus agents/<name>.md formats.
docs/research/local-orchestration-survey.md records package names and versions for oh-my-claudecode, oh-my-codex, oh-my-openagent, and oh-my-cursor as of 2026-05-20.

docs/research/grok-build-docs.md documents that Grok CLI 0.1.212 supports --agent, --agents JSON, --resume, named -s sessions, plan mode, --check headless self-verification, and built-in subagent spawning.

stories.title: One-skill orchestration surface
acceptanceCriteria: Exactly one SKILL.md exists under skills/ at skills/omgb/SKILL.md.
skills/omgb/SKILL.md defines intake, grounding, planning, execution, verification, review, fix loop, finalization phases and a role router.
skills/omgb/SKILL.md loads role detail by dereferencing per-role files at agents/<role>.md and roles/<role>.toml rather than inlining role bodies.
Top-level plugin.json and .claude-plugin/plugin.json declare only the skills entry and no hooks, mcpServers, commands, or agents keys.

stories.title: Roles split into per-file Grok-native agent prompts
acceptanceCriteria: agents/ contains exactly 16 per-role .md files matching the 16 roles in the role catalog and no others.
Every agents/<role>.md has YAML frontmatter with at minimum name, description, prompt_mode, permission_mode, and agents_md keys, plus a model key when applicable.
Every agents/<role>.md body documents purpose, scope, responsibilities, inputs, outputs, constraints, execution process, failure handling, records kept, and interaction with verification or review.
agents/AGENTS.md is a thin index referencing each per-role file and is under 80 lines.

stories.title: Roles also expressed as Grok-native roles/<role>.toml
acceptanceCriteria: roles/ contains exactly 16 .toml files matching the agent set with no extras.
Every roles/<role>.toml sets description, default_capability_mode, and reasoning_effort with allowed values.
Read-only roles (intake-analyst, researcher, codebase-scout, planner, architect, verifier, code-reviewer, security-reviewer, performance-reviewer, ux-reviewer) have default_capability_mode read-only.
Mutating roles (leader, executor, debugger, test-engineer, writer, git-steward) have default_capability_mode all.

stories.title: Smoke and sanity validator enforces the new layout
acceptanceCriteria: node scripts/validate.mjs --smoke exits 0 and prints [OMGB] smoke passed.
node scripts/validate.mjs --sanity exits 0 and prints [OMGB] sanity passed.

Validator rejects any extra SKILL.md, any role missing from agents/ or roles/, any role with malformed frontmatter, any plugin manifest declaring hooks, MCP servers, commands, or agents, and any presence of forbidden hooks/, mcps/, mcp/, or commands/ directories.
npm test exits 0 and runs both --smoke and --sanity.

stories.title: E2E validation against existing Grok login
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/e2e.sh exists and is executable.
scripts/e2e.sh asserts ~/.grok/auth.json exists before continuing and refuses to log in for the user.
scripts/e2e.sh prints [OMGB] e2e passed only when grok inspect, a headless grok -p reachability probe, and the plugin payload check all succeed.
An E2E run on this machine produces a trace at .omc/evidence/e2e-<timestamp>.log that contains [OMGB] e2e passed.

stories.title: Local install into ~/.grok/plugins/local
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/install-local.sh exists, is executable, and copies the minimal runtime payload to ~/.grok/plugins/local/oh-my-grokbuild.
The installed payload contains plugin.json, .claude-plugin/plugin.json, skills/omgb/SKILL.md, agents/ with 16 role files, and roles/ with 16 role configs.
Running scripts/install-local.sh on this machine produces no errors and prints an [OMGB] install ok marker.
scripts/install-local.sh does not require sudo, network access, or any package install.

stories.title: Public GitHub remote with first version published
acceptanceCriteria: The local repository is a git repository with a clean working tree after publish.
A public GitHub repository PeterPonyu/oh-my-grokbuild exists and is the configured origin.
The remote main branch contains the v0.1.0 commit and an annotated tag v0.1.0.
.omc/evidence/publish.log records the gh CLI commands and the resulting remote URL.
